form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (23.44) over 400m at this track. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (23.17) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 2.75 lengths second. Has two successes and three minors from seven starts from box 2. Expected to be in the finish.
